category_sources: source_facts.description says AWS SQS Message mover; official GitHub README says sqsmover moves AWS SQS messages from one queue to another.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is SQS Message Mover; source_facts.name and executable identify the command as sqsmover.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains feature, usage, and build documentation for sqsmover.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/mercury2269/sqsmover; per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes moving AWS SQS messages between queues and dead-letter queue recovery; GitHub topics include cli, golang, and aws-sqs.
